extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by the entities from matters against them: I counted only the “Against” rows. Criminal proceedings against the listed entities total 2 (both against directors); statutory/regulatory proceedings against all listed entities are Nil (0); tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiary total 2 + 5 = 7, excluding the directors’ Nil tax row and all “By” rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiary is ₹70.19 million + ₹6.58 million = ₹76.77 million, converted from million to ₹7.677 crore; “Not ascertainable” amounts were excluded. Consolidated contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹76.95 million as of March 31, 2022, converted to ₹7.695 crore, rather than summing line items. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 29.10% for Fiscal 2022, based on total revenue; the source tables use ₹ million, and ₹1 million equals ₹0.1 crore.
